title: crotalaria ericoides
intro: Crotalaria ericoides, also known as the "hairy stickseed" or "yellow stickseed", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria ericoides include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
